name: github-copilot-cli-course
description: GitHub Copilot CLI for Beginners - Course Materials

scripts.test: cd samples/book-app-project && python -c "import os; os.makedirs('reports', exist_ok=True)" && python -m pip install --quiet pytest-html pytest-cov coverage && python -m pytest -q --html=reports/pytest-report.html --self-contained-html
scripts.generate:demos: npm run create:tapes && npm run generate:vhs && npm run verify:gifs

author: Microsoft Corporation
